notes: Golden question set for the Colonial Archives Graph-RAG retrieval. 'abstention'-category questions are OUT-OF-CORPUS: the archive-first design may answer them via the labelled web fallback, so success is 'no fabricated archive grounding' (zero archive citations, source_type != archive) rather than full refusal. In-domain questions MUST NOT abstain and are scored on Recall@5 + citation grounding + faithfulness; expected_doc_ids are filled from a live discovery pass (evals/discover.py -> results/discovery.json) against confirmed source documents.
